Book Now
Two Vendors. One Booking.

Pick Your Setup

Book one or both. Either way, we handle everything so you don't have to think about it day-of.

🎛️
$600
DJ Service
3 hours. Your crowd will be on the floor. Both the grandmas and the toddlers.
  • Set built around your music preferences
  • Three DJs rotating through the event
  • Fog machine + lights for night events
  • Day-of scripting and mic included
📸
$600
Photo Booth
3 hours. Walk away with actual prints, not just a shared album link nobody opens.
  • Real DSLR camera + flattering lighting
  • Custom theme-matched print design
  • Onsite attendant the whole time
  • 400+ high-res digital images per event
🎛️📸
$800
DJ + Photo Booth Bundle
3 hours. One booking, two vendors, zero day-of chaos. Save $400.
  • Everything in DJ Service
  • Everything in Photo Booth
  • Coordinated setup — we figure out logistics together
  • One contact for both, start to finish
Add-On

Party Photos & Social Reel

We capture photos and short video clips throughout the event and cut them into a social reel. Not a full event photographer — just us documenting the vibe as it happens.

$200add to any package
